title: Marianne Petit, Director of Interactive Media Arts
description: May 14, 2015 - “I am not a competitive person, but the students I teach are under a lot of pressure. I just want to help them be themselves. It's hard but important.” - Marianne Petit, Director of Interactive Media Arts (by Jane Xu)
